data.biography:
Avan Tudor Jogia (/ˈævən ˈdʒoʊɡiə/; born February 9, 1992) is a Canadian actor, singer, author and director. He first received recognition for portraying Danny Araujo in the television film A Girl Like Me: The Gwen Araujo Story (2006). After moving to the United States in his late teens, he landed various television roles on television series such as Caprica (2009–2010) and, famously, Victorious (2010–2013).

Jogia rose to mainstream prominence for his roles as Danny Desai in the drama series Twisted (2013), Tutankhamun in the miniseries Tut (2015), Roman Mercer in the paranormal action series Ghost Wars (2017–2018) and Ulysses Zane in the comedy series Now Apocalypse (2019). Numerous credits in television and cinema include Spectacular! (2009), Finding Hope Now (2010), Rags (2012), Ten Thousand Saints (2015), I Am Michael (2015) and Zombieland: Double Tap (2019). His directorial debut came in 2011 with the short film Alex. He stars as Leon S. Kennedy in the 2021 film Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City.

In 2011, Jogia co-founded the LGBT online organisation Straight But Not Narrow, which seeks to shape the viewpoints of teenagers and adults on matters related to the LGBT community. In 2019, he published his first book, Mixed Feelings, a series of short stories and poems about multiracial identity. He hand-painted all the illustrations in the book. His second book of poetry, "Autopsy (Of an Ex-Teen Heartthrob): Poems of Love, Rage, Sex and Sadness", was released on February 11, 2025.

Jogia and his brother Ketan make up the band Saint Ivory. They released an album to complement the book, also titled Mixed Feelings. Jogia plays guitar, piano, and accordion, as well as sings.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Avan Jogia, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Avan Jogia

data.biography:
Avan Jogia（1992 年 2 月 9 日出生）是一位加拿大演员，以在 Victorious 中扮演 Beck Oliver 而闻名。

他在电影表演学校接受了屡获殊荣的表演教练克尔斯滕·克拉克森（Kirsten Clarkson）的指导和培训，他帮助他取得了令人难以置信的职业生涯。https://www.screenactingschool.com/
data.name: 阿万·乔贾

data.biography:
💥Эван Тюдор Джогиа. Родился в 1992-ом году в Ванкувере, Канада. Был единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал бизнесменом, а мать была менеджером. Учился в средней школе Килларни в Ванкувере. Работает актёром, режиссёром и продюсером. С 2023-го состоит в отношениях с певицей Холзи, детей у пары нет

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Teen Choice Awards (2013) [Социопат]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Виктория-победительница» (2010), «Zомбилэнд: Контрольный выстрел» (2019), «Выбери любовь» (2023), «Обитель зла» (2021), «Социопат» (2013)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Эван имеет индийские, английские и валлийские корни
data.name: Эван Джогиа

data.biography:
阿萬·喬賈（1992 年 2 月 9 日出生）是一位加拿大演員，以在 Victorious 中扮演 Beck Oliver 而聞名。

他在電影表演學校接受了屢獲殊榮的表演教練克爾斯滕·克拉克森（Kirsten Clarkson）的指導和培訓，他幫助他取得了令人難以置信的職業生涯。https://www.screenactingschool.com/
data.name: 阿萬·喬賈
アヴァン・ジョーギア

data.overview: Cuộc phiêu lưu lịch sử Trung Quốc-Ấn Độ về cuộc hành trình đường bộ kéo dài mười bảy năm của Xuan Zang đến Ấn Độ trong triều đại nhà Đường vào thế kỷ thứ bảy
data.title: Đại Đường Huyền Trang
